inputs.label: Guest Count
inputs.businessContext: The number of guests expected at the buffet.

inputs.label: Ticket Price
inputs.businessContext: The price each guest pays for the buffet.

inputs.label: Food Cost
inputs.businessContext: The average cost of food ingredients per guest.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total labor cost for the event, including preparation and service.

inputs.label: Overhead Cost
inputs.businessContext: Fixed overhead costs such as rent, utilities, equipment rental.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food cost expected to be wasted (spoilage, leftovers).
